additionalSourceRule: Official regional observations and optional activity or industrial covariates must carry their own public source IDs in the generated weights artifact.

official.uncertainty: Preserve the published range; use a point range only when the source reports a point value.

multi_covariate.note: Allocate the residual country control from normalized electricity-activity/night-light, population, and industrial-facility shares. Missing components are renormalized and disclosed.

population_only.note: Fallback allocation from population share only; uncertainty is deliberately wider and confidence lower.

historicalControlRule: Country controls already include operating data-centre and water loads. Never add them during historical allocation.
forwardIncrementRule: Only explicit, sourced, once-only project increments may be added for target years 2026-2031.
